name: CRE MARKET
bio: We are the new CRE industry marketplace and community hub for commercial real estate ecosystem. We connect brokers, investors, tenants, and service providers through our Telegram communities, TikTok content, and online marketplace.

customLinks.title: CRE Deal Stages as TikTok AR Effects
🧭 Sourcing
customLinks.description: Where is it at? The new CRE address system is powered by what3words.com keep it simple.Use the AR Effect CREMARKET Sourcing to create free discovery posts with the hashtag #CREsourcing

customLinks.title: 🔎 Underwriting
customLinks.description: Is it a good deal? Analyze numbers, video OM created replacing boring PDFs with engaging TikTok content. Use the AR Effect CREMARKET Underwriting to create free underwriting posts with the hashtag #CREunderwriting.

customLinks.title: 💼 Offer
customLinks.description: I want in! Post the offer, share the video, and get feedback from the community to move the deal forward.Use the AR Effect CREMARKET Offer to create free offer posts with hashtag #CREoffer.

customLinks.title: 🏛️ Capital
customLinks.description: Got funding? Celebrate the win, share the news, and attract more investors with TikTok content. Use the AR Effect CREMARKET Capital to create free fundraising posts with hashtag #CREcapital.

customLinks.title: 🏗️ Build
customLinks.description: Discuss development, construction, and value-add strategies with Atlanta's CRE builders, contractors, and service providers. Use the AR Effect CREMARKET Build to create free construction posts with hashtag #CREbuild.

customLinks.title: 🔑 Key
customLinks.description: Talk about the lease signing, property management, and operations with CRE operators, property managers, and tenants. Use the AR Effect CREMARKET Control to create free operations posts with hashtag #CREcontrol.

customLinks.title: 📈 Story
customLinks.description: What happened? Share the story behind the deal, the lessons learned, and the journey of the CRE industry with the community. Use the AR Effect CREMARKET Story to create free storytelling posts with hashtag #CREstory.

customLinks.title: 🛒 Telegram CRE MARKETPLACE
customLinks.description: Access the CRE Marketplace for online and offline deals — We connect principals, brokers, lenders, and investors across the capital stack.
